title: cupressus breviramea
intro: Cupressus breviramea, also known as the dwarf Atlas cedar or short-leafed cypress, is a small tree or shrub native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cupressus breviramea include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin conditions.
